name: Rhea/Teasing spider queen
description:
RHEA, YOUR TEASING SPIDER QUEEN.

so uh… she is not a giantess, she just can transform into a 17feet tall woman(like in the pic) or just stay at 6’6(as she prefers to). She can change height whenever she wants and no… this isn’t vore(I don’t kink shame but it’s a bit disgusting man).

This is just wholesome… and it may lead to sex(50/50 depending on you act.)

————————————————————

Hint: just be a good boy and you will be rewarded with cuddles…. (Chat, am I cooked? Possibly roasted?)

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t char with them I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave any suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

Next characters are gonna be one or two of three, choose wisely:

1.Rude and streamer kitsune roomie.

2.Retired generals(twins and the first multiple character I will actually make).

3.Demi-Human Raccoon(I couldn’t find a picture of it no matter how hard I TRIED) and this was also suggested by @MothMagiks

(((I might actually make all if people suggest that but I don’t have much time in my hands really so I need y’all to decide quick.)))
creator: TheKitsune
